title: iberis linifolia subsp. lagascana
intro: Iberis linifolia subsp. lagascana, also known as Rock Cress, is a flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rock Cress include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for consumption through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
